# GitHub Copilot instructions

The canonical agent guide for this repository is **[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)** at the repo root. Read that first — it covers build/test commands, critical conventions (diagnostic socket UID, `.dockerignore` re-includes, EventPipe timing), and the Phase 7 roadmap.

Quick links:

- [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) — full operating guide
- [Phase 7 tracking issue #17](https://github.com/pedrosakuma/dotnet-diagnostics-mcp/issues/17) — what to work on next
- [`docs/`](../docs) — tool reference, investigation playbooks, sidecar walkthrough
